reviews.review_title: This is a pretty fun experience.
reviews.review_description: Especially with friends this is a amazing game to play from playing tag or doing some hilarious glitches that you end up finding. Or flipping your head upside down and spinning on the ground with the hilarious player model. This game is amazing for laughs and gameplay in general even without friends. It's a amazing game to meet friends in as well.
gtag is so overwhelming with how many maps and unnecessary updates there are, while this game is simple and fun to play

reviews.review_title: Games alright but it just released
reviews.review_description: At the time of making this alot of bugs are present but its still SUPER good game. if you dont really like gtag then this game is another version of it but imo better! Sure it may not have a bog dev team. Sure it may not be content filled like gtag but. the games super good, if you want a break from gtag then join this game and play while the community is still small. I love this game ❤️

reviews.review_title: This game already better than gtag
reviews.review_description: I love this game thanks to the awesome developers who made such a beautiful game just like gorilla tag makes me feel old again even tho it ain’t gtag😭😂
ts game mogs every fan game to ever exist its so good its insane.
